creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 223495
fix distinfo for updated source package

Building multimedia/makemkv 1.16.3 fails with

=> Attempting to fetch http://www.makemkv.com/download/makemkv-oss-1.16.3.tar.gz
fetch: http://www.makemkv.com/download/makemkv-oss-1.16.3.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 6536466, actual 6536679

The reason is upstream decided to integrate some build fix "in place", see here:
https://forum.makemkv.com/forum/viewtopic.php?p=106871#p106871

Patch for distinfo attached, smoke-test done with poudriere testport on 14-CURRENT amd64/i386.
